name: cta
title: CTA
description: Add-to-cart primitives wired to the sveltekit-medusa-sdk cart remotes. AddToCartButton resolves variant/quantity from Product context (or props), shows pending/aria-busy state and an accessible inline success/error message, with optional post-add redirect. AddToCartToggle reflects cart membership for a variant/condition via a checkbox (or a custom children snippet). Also available as flat exports (AddToCartButton, AddToCartToggle).

files.content: {#if message} {@render message({ status, cart: resultCart, error, id: statusId })} {:else if showStatus} {#if status === 'success'} Added to cart {:else if status === 'error'} {errorText} {/if} {/if}
{#if show} {#if children} {@render children({ on, pending, disabled, toggle })} {:else} {/if} {/if} {#snippet pending()}{/snippet}

export { default as AddToCartButton } from './add-to-cart-button.svelte'
export { default as AddToCartToggle } from './add-to-cart-toggle.svelte'
export type { AddToCartFn, RemoveFromCartFn, GetCartFn, CartCondition, CartLine } from './types.js'
export * as logic from './add-to-cart-logic.js'
